patches.summary: Add Restaurant365-specific schema discovery, redacted sampling, backfill planning, delete tombstone checks, bounded export, and OData pagination behavior.
patches.reason: The generated endpoint wrappers could fetch documented views, but data engineers need safe tenant validation and explicit refresh planning before loading Restaurant365 OData into a warehouse.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./..., go build ./cmd/restaurant365-odata-pp-cli, and redacted live Restaurant365 OData validation passed.

patches.summary: Correct Basic auth guidance and document Restaurant365 OData warehouse refresh patterns.
patches.reason: Restaurant365 OData uses username/password Basic auth, not a single API key; public docs also needed to explain rowVersion, date-window refresh, and EntityDeleted workflows.
patches.validated_outcome: doctor verified live $metadata, samples stayed redacted, and publish validate passed Go build/vet/skill checks before phase proof generation.

patches.summary: Ensure date-window exports fetch every planned backfill chunk, paginate each chunk, preserve full-day upper bounds, avoid partial output files, and keep dry-runs file-free.
patches.reason: Multi-month Restaurant365 date exports must not silently stop after the first generated chunk or first OData page, and failed or dry-run exports must not leave misleading generated files in the publish tree.
patches.validated_outcome: Focused Go regression tests covered multi-chunk export filters, page-by-page export, nanosecond end-of-day bounds, failed-write cleanup, and dry-run export behavior.

patches.summary: Use one canonical GLAccount sync resource and add deterministic ordering to paginated sync requests.
patches.reason: Offset pagination needs a stable order, and GLAccount aliases should not sync the same dataset twice.
patches.validated_outcome: Focused Go regression tests covered GLAccount alias deduplication and stable $orderby sync parameters.

patches.summary: Add bounded payroll-period overlap filters to PayrollSummary reads.
patches.reason: Restaurant365 rejects PayrollSummary reads without a valid payroll date range, so the promoted command needs explicit and default filters that include periods overlapping the requested window.
patches.validated_outcome: Focused Go regression tests covered explicit overlap filters and the default bounded PayrollSummary live path.

patches.summary: Add examples to custom Restaurant365 workflow command help.
patches.reason: Publish dogfood requires usable examples on custom commands, and these examples also show safe bounded R365 workflows.
patches.validated_outcome: Focused Go regression tests covered Examples sections for each custom Restaurant365 command.

patches.summary: Validate rowVersion inputs before adding them to generated OData filters.
patches.reason: RowVersion filters should reject non-numeric input instead of echoing invalid OData expressions.
patches.validated_outcome: Focused Go regression tests covered rejection of invalid backfill watermark and deleted-records rowVersion input.
